title: stoerkia draco
intro: Stoerkia draco, also known as the Dragon's Blood tree, is a plant native to the island of Socotra in Yemen, known for its distinctive red sap. The medicinal properties of Stoerkia draco include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Stoerkia draco include the sap being used as a tincture, capsule, or topical cream, and is also sometimes used in traditional medicine as an antiseptic and astringent.
